translations: O you who believe O you who believe
puzzle.hint: A beloved call to abundant remembrance of Allah — a foundational verse about dhikr.
puzzle.arabic: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ ٱذْكُرُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ ذِكْرًۭا كَثِيرًۭا
puzzle.verseEn: O you who have believed, remember Allāh with much remembrance
